claims.falsification: any theorem row omits frozen statement, solution declaration, discharge gate, or proof declaration refs

claims.falsification: the pass 0035 validator result is missing, reports DRIFT, or has different theorem, packet, or transcript counts

claims.falsification: pass 0035 artifacts claim an axiom-free result, validate every public pipeline-math claim, promote a partial theorem set as complete, or promote a natural law
claims.text: Pass 0035 preserves non-promotion boundaries: it verifies ten theorem-specific replay targets inside the local Lean artifact, rejects axiom-free and public-claim overpromotion, and current_promoted_natural_laws remains none.
